title: Extended limitation period for fraud cases under Section 74
text: For cases involving fraud, willful misstatement, or suppression of facts with intent to evade tax, the limitation period under Section 74 of the CGST Act, 2017 is five years from the due date of filing the annual return for the relevant financial year. The extended period of five years applies only when the department can establish that the taxpayer has committed fraud or deliberately suppressed facts. The burden of proving fraud lies on the department. Without establishing fraud, Section 74 cannot be invoked.
